title: forms — authorization policies
description: Three policies. Public submission bypasses the policy layer entirely (signed session URL is the auth mechanism). Admin CRUD on Form + FormVersion is tenant-admin only. FormSubmission view scoped to authoring user + admin — plus safeguarding officer sees submissions containing medical / safeguarding data.

abilities.scope: admin + owner. branch_manager for branch-scoped custom surveys
author + admin + owner. Draft state only for schema fields
admin + owner. Only allowed on archived forms with 0 submissions
admin + owner. Reason REQUIRED. Full audit chain
form owner + branch_manager + admin + owner. Excludes anonymous submissions with medical answers unless viewer has medical role
sensitivity-gated. Medical fields blur unless viewer has medical.viewAny
admin + owner. Full-body download logs to audit trail
admin + owner. Bulk PII exports flagged in reporting audit
admin + owner. GDPR erasure path — replaces answers with tombstone
